titleStmt.title: SII 41.44: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 44. (A.R. No. 43 of 1905.) Perumukkal, Tiṇḍivaṉam Taluk, South Arcot District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the Mukhyachalaesvara temple on the hill.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya, Maravarman Vikrama Pāṇḍya Year 7 = 1290 A.D.

summary.p: Gift of a salt-pan (aḷam) called Tirumalaichchokkaṉ, by the ūrār of Marakkāṉam in Ōymā-nāḍu alias Vijaiyarājentira-vaḷanāḍu as tirunāmattukkāṇi to the temple of Vālmīkīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār on the hill at Perumukkil. Originally this salt-pan was a kuḍinīṅgā-dēvadānam of the temple and it was lying waste from the days of Kōpperuñjinga until now. Nearly twenty members of the ūrār signed the document.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīvikrama pāṇṭiya
tevarkku yāṇṭu Ejayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Oymā
ṉāṭāṉa vicaiyarācentira vaḷanāṭṭu marakkāṉattu Ūravarom puttūrāṉa
Uttamacoḻap peraḷattup pāṇṭiyarāyaṉ vāykkālaḷattukkuk
kiḻakkut tirumalaiccokkaṉ Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa Aḷam
Oṉṟum perumukkil tirumalaiyil Uṭaiyār śrīvālmikiśvaramuṭaiya nā
yaṉār kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉam neṭunāḷppaṭa Aṉupavittup pontu
pallavaṉ kopperuñciṅkar nāḷ tuṭaṅki varampuṅ karaiyum Aḻintupāḻ
kiṭakkaiyil Ivvāṇṭaip paṅkūṉi māta mutal kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉaṅkaḻit
tu Iṉṉāyaṉārkkut tirunāmattuk kāṇi Ākat tantom marakkāṉattu Ūravarōm
Ivai Aṇukkappallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu cempiyaṉ pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu teṉṉavatarai
yaṉ Eḻuttu vāḷuvarāyaṉ Eḻuttu maḻavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu tevarkaṇṭaṉ Eḻuttu kurukularāyaṉ Eḻu
ttu cempiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu miṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu ceḻiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu vicai
yarāyaṉ Eḻuttu tiṇṭivaṉamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu vāṉavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu tevāṇṭai
Eḻuttu vikkiramacoḻappaṭṭaṉa ṉāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu kulottuṅka coḻappaṭṭiṉa ṉāṭ
ṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu kuṉṟameṭuttāṉ Eḻuttu tiruvaṇṇāmalaiyuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu kurukularā
yaṉ Ātipuruṣaṉ Eḻuttu Irācamāṇikkap pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Aruḷmoḻip pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
paṭṭiṉaṉāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu teṉṉavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Irārāppaṭṭiṉa ṉāṭṭu veḷāṉ
Eḻuttu villavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Akaḷaṅkappal
lavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu civakkoḻuntaṉ Irācentira coḻa viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Araiyaṉ
tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Arumpākkiḻāṉ Eḻuttu nallātaṉ tiruvaṇṇāmalaiyuṭai
yāṉ ma
ḻavarā
yaṉ E
ḻuttu§
Digital edition of SII 41.44 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
